legal_description.value: Lot 56, SEVILLE PARCEL 3, according to the plat of record in the office of the County Recorder of Maricopa County, Arizona, recorded in Book 554 of Maps, Page 19; Affidavit of Correction recorded in Document No. 2001-0849180

source_note.value: Demo-only synthesized purchase-money DOT on Henderson parcel 999-04-401 (tax-sale REO scenario). This DOT is the critical examiner concern: it was EXTINGUISHED BY OPERATION OF LAW upon recording of the Treasurer's Deed (20220200005) under A.R.S. § 42-18267, but no release was ever recorded. Appears 'open' in a raw index query — an examiner must reconcile this. Not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.

raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only pre-crash Countrywide DOT on Henderson parcel 999-04-401 (tax-sale REO scenario); not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.

mers_note: MERS beneficiary as nominee for Countrywide Home Loans, Inc. Countrywide was acquired by Bank of America in July 2008. No assignment of DOT to Bank of America or a securitization trust has been recorded in this parcel's corpus. Note: the underlying DOT is extinguished of record by the 2022 Treasurer's Deed (20220200005); a successor-in-interest release is the industry-standard cure but has not been obtained.
